Group 1 Good.guide:
## 🛡️ **Quest Name: Group 1, Level 30**
**NPC:** varies, see below  
**Location:** Forkwatch

---

### 📋 Requirements
Attaining level 30 and completion of your **Level 20 path quest**.

Your level 20 path questgiver advises you to seek a new trainer in Forkwatch to log your level 30 path quest:
- **Thumgrim Stoutshield** *(in bar opposite coach)*, or
- **Erilous Skypyre** *(2nd floor, NE corner)*, or
- **Elowyn Dawnspring** *(2nd floor)*.

**Dwarf & Western Human Paladins:** Speak to **Sir Arik Lightfire** in Forkwatch. From the coach, head into the big building on your right, go to the very top, and he is standing there with **Captain Bordengahst**.

---

After logging the quest, you are sent to **Crikston Gundlefop** in **Highpass Hold**. To find him: coach to HP, enter the building opposite the coachman, second floor. Crikston wants **three tablets**: **clay**, **stone**, and **bronze**.

> 📝 **NOTE:** If you talk to Crikston again, he will explain the three quests and how to start each. These are essentially **three separate level 30 side quests**.

---

## 🧭 EXPEDITION A
### Runed Clay Tablet
Talk to **Argot Bittersteel** in **Blakedown**. From the **DM coach**, head out the west gate and follow the road south (it will curve west) to Blakedown. Argot is in the first building on your right as you enter town.

He asks you to:
1. Retrieve loot in **Al-Karad's Ruin**, and
2. Kill **Savage Bear**.

**Finding Al-Karad's Ruin:** From Argot, follow the road west. At the NW tower at the end of Blakedown, take the road north until it ends, then head due north until the road resumes. Follow it to the ruins.

**Getting the loot:** Enter the ruins, go down the ramp, and head straight to the back room. You will get a popup indicating you obtained the loot. You must kill all mobs encountered. Even with invis, you must kill the two mobs in the loot room. These mobs mostly **CON DB/White@30** and have a **large aggro range**.

**Savage Bear (Polar Bear):** *(CONs White@30)*. The bear roams outside the ruins, usually behind them. Kill it, loot the **Runed Clay Tablet**, and return to Argot.

**Rewards:** 789,086 XP, **Medallion of Fortitude**, and quest progression.  
*Medallion of Fortitude:* 15 STA, 20 HP, 5 AC, 20 DR, Lvl 30, All/All.

---

## 🧭 EXPEDITION B
### Runed Stone Tablet
Talk to **Two-Eyed Jack** in **Trail's End (S)**. From the HP coach, head out the west/south gate and follow the long, winding road to a small village. Jack is in one of the houses.

Jack sends you to find out what happened to **Maximillian Scriber**.

Return to the long road and head north-ish until you reach a cave on your right. Fight into the cave until the **Silvermist Alpha** spawns *(triggered, CONs White@30)*. Kill her and loot **Maximillian's Journal** and the **Runed Stone Tablet**. Return to Jack.

**Rewards:** 394,543 XP, **Two-Eyed Jack's Belt**, and quest progression.  
*Two-Eyed Jack's Belt:* 10 AGI, 10 CHA, 35 POW, 22 AC, Lvl 30, All/All.

---

## 🧭 EXPEDITION C
### Runed Bronze Tablet
Talk to **Finnus Sodwin** at the **Black Swan Inn** (second floor). From the DM coach, head out the west gate and follow the road south; the inn is on the right near a blacksmith area.

Finnus sends you to kill **Skarr** *(CONs Yellow@30)* in **Blackburrow**.

**Finding Blackburrow:** From the DM coach, head out the west gate and follow the road north to the Gnoll Fort. Bypass the fort to the east and continue until you see the tunnel entrance.

**Finding Skarr:** Enter the tunnel, take the first right and go upstairs *(shaman here sees invis)*. Continue through tunnels where more mobs see invis, then go down a cliff and head right. Look for a hidden tunnel leading to a huge cavern. Make the first right, fight *(this mob sees invis)*, move along the small cliff to the right, enter a narrow tunnel. Skarr spawns at the back of this small cavern.

Kill Skarr, loot the **Bronze Headpiece** and the **Runed Bronze Tablet**, and return to Finnus.

**Rewards:** 1,084,993 XP and 3,000 tunar.

---

## ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 30)
You should now have **three (3) tablets** in your inventory. If you lose one, the quest givers will replace it **for free**, but only if you are flagged as having completed the quest.

Return to **Crikston Gundlefop** to receive a letter. Then return to your starting quest NPC in Forkwatch for your final rewards.

**Final Rewards:** 7,890,859 XP, your **path ability**, and one of the following:
- **Paladin:** Sword of Purity **OR** Hammer of Humility
- **Cleric:** Holy Forgehammer **OR** Benevolent Battlehammer
- **Wizard:** Staff of Tears **OR** Rod of Power
- **Bard:** Rapier of Rapidity **OR** Shimmering Saber

---
---

## 🛡️ **Quest Name: Group 1, Level 40**
**NPC:** Crikston Gundlefop  
**Location:** Highpass Hold

---

### 📋 Requirements
Attaining level 40 and completion of the **Level 30 path quest** from Crikston Gundlefop.

Talk to Crikston in Highpass. He needs **three paraphet rods**. Two are already en route, but you must retrieve the third from **Twindle Fizzmop**, located behind the blacksmith in **Freeport**.

Twindle will trade the rod only for the **Sceptre of Tal'Thaz**, found on **Rauntet** *(CONs White@40)* in an undead valley of **Al'Farak Ruins (C)**, west of the large Nashier camp. The valley is packed with awakened spirits; invis is recommended. Rauntet is a **triggered spawn**. Kill him, loot the scepter, return to Twindle, and pay **3,000 tunar** *(5,000 if you do not haggle)*.

Return to Crikston. As you hand over the scepter, an **Assassin** *(CONs LB@40)* spawns. Kill it and loot a **Druidic Symbol**.

> 📝 **NOTE:** If you fail to kill the Assassin, speak with Crikston again to respawn it.

Crikston sends you to **Shiol'Anara** in **Surefall Glade**. She asks you to seek the great bear spirit **Urisai**, but first you must gather:
- The **Bow of Poacher McGee**
- The **Wing of a Jade Drake**
- The **Hide of a Tainted Wolf**

**Tainted Wolf:** *(CONs White@40)* spawns in **Mariel Village (E)**. Farm until the hide drops.

**Trapper McGee:** *(CONs Yellow@40)* roams **Surefall Glade**, past and near the lake. Kill and loot his bow.

**Jade Drake:** *(CONs Yellow to Red)* spawns in **Salisearaneen**. Tough caster. Kill until the wing drops.

Return to Shiol. She sends you to the druid ring in Surefall Glade. Wait ~30 seconds with all items to spawn **Urisai**. He reveals the assassin belongs to the **Night Callers** of the Unkempt North. Return to Crikston.

Crikston then asks you to retrieve an **Examiner Lens** from an **Evil Eye Examiner** *(CONs Yellow@40)* in **Moss Mouth Cavern (C)**. Take the right tunnel; kill the Evil Eye and its goblin guards, loot the lens, and return.

---

## ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 40)
Speak with Crikston again after a minute. He sends you to your class trainer in Forkwatch.

**Final Rewards:** 14,919,719 XP, your **path ability**, and one of the following:
- **Paladin:** Blade of the Righteous **OR** Hammer of Virtue
- **Cleric:** Hallowed Morningstar **OR** Sacrosanct Warhammer
- **Wizard:** War Wizard's Staff **OR** Wand of War
- **Bard:** Strike of Harmony **OR** Slash of Resonance

---
---

## 🛡️ **Quest Name: Group 1, Level 49**
**NPC:** Crikston Gundlefop  
**Location:** Highpass Hold

---

### 📋 Requirements
Attaining level 49 and completion of the **Level 40 path quest**.

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Ensure you have plenty of inventory space. Save **everything** NPCs give you until you receive your final rewards and final path ability.

Crikston sends you to **Anya Spiritdottir** in **Binshore**, south of Wyndhaven along the coast in **Whale's Hill (W)**.

She sends you to **Halsfur Whitepaw**, a barbarian hermit in a glowing blue bear cave in the **Snowblind Plains (NE)**. Bring **5,000 tunar**. Inside, invis is required. In the largest room, find a barely visible ledge on the right wall and follow it back to Halsfur.

Halsfur requires a **Scratched Worm Chitin** and 5,000 tunar. Kill **Great Worms** *(CONs LB@49)* in **Permafrost (SE–TY Lear)** until it drops. Return to Halsfur for the **Amulet of Protection**, which allows portal entry. Return to Crikston.

---

## 🔐 THE FIRST SEAL (1/4)
Travel to the **Heyokah Burial Ground** in **Spirit Talkers Woods (C)**. From Murnf, run due east to a lake; the portal is a black orb in the center.

> ⚠️ Entering without the amulet causes a **-650 DoT** until death or exit.

Speak to the **Caretaker** and begin the trial. Defeat **Eidolon of Malice** *(CONs DB@49)* within the timed event and loot its essence orb. Speak to the Caretaker again to receive **Spiritwalker's Totem**.

Return to Crikston *(1/4 seals)*.

---

## 🔐 THE SECOND SEAL (2/4)
Speak to **Oransan** downstairs in the Highpass Inn. He sends you to **Salissearaneen (NE)** to defeat **The Slar** *(CONs White@49)* in the Den of the Grave Wolves. Clear wolves, kill The Slar, loot the **Shield of Orthimius**, and return *(2/4 seals)*.

---

## 🔐 THE THIRD SEAL (3/4)
Go to **Permafrost (N)** and kill **Frostborn III** *(CONs LB@49)*. Loot his sword, then drive it into the ice throne to spawn **Frostborn II** *(CONs Yellow@49)*. Kill and loot **Frostcleaver** *(3/4 seals)*.

---

## 🔐 THE FOURTH SEAL (4/4)
Travel to **Anu Village (NE)** at the Unnamed King's castle. Invis inside. Kill **Tolo Grimsteel** and **Ganron Lorebane**, loot their gems, then summon and defeat the **Unnamed King** *(CONs Yellow@49)* to loot the **Unnamed Crown** *(4/4 seals)*.

---

## ⚔️ PARATHIOR
Bring all four seals to **Oransan** in **Snowblind Plains (N)**. He summons **Parathior**. Speak to **Orinas** (bear form) to choose your Epic weapons, then defeat Parathior and loot an **Ice Chunk**.

---

## 🏁 FINAL QUEST COMPLETION
Return to **Crikston Gundlefop**. He sends you to a class-specific NPC to determine your **Level 49 Path Ability**. Complete the approval visits for your 20, 30, and 40 quests, then return for your final choice.

> 📝 **NOTE:** Bards must seek **Kaldesh Illinor** in the Freeport tavern.

**Final Rewards:** 45,558,313 XP, your **path ability**, and one of the following:
- **Paladin:** Epic Divinesword **OR** Epic Warhammer
- **Cleric:** Epic Hammer **OR** Epic Mace
- **Wizard:** Epic Rod **OR** Epic Staff
- **Bard:** Epic Rapier x2 **OR** Epic Saber x2

Group 2 Good.guide:
## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 2, Level 30**
**NPC:** Dixxon Tristar  
**Location:** Castle Lightwolf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 30  
- Completion of your **Level 20 path quest**

---

### 🗣️ Quest Walkthrough
Talk to **Dixxon Tristar** in Castle Lightwolf, east of the coachman. He sends you to see **Deputy Sools**, who filed a report about spotting one of the jewels.

**Deputy Sools** (outside Castle Lightwolf, left tower) sends you to **Sissy Hasper**, who reported seeing a dark drake with a red necklace. She is located in a village in **North Wilderlands (S)**, south/southwest of the castle, in the most southern house.

### 🔴 Red Elemental Necklace
Sissy sends you to kill a **Dark Drake** (CONs yellow) in **Guardian Forest (SW)**. Kill it, loot the **Red Elemental Necklace**, and return to Deputy Sools.

Deputy Sools then sends you to **Captain Benta**, outside of Halas, who mentions a majestic Freezblood and a white bracelet.

### ⚪ White Elemental Bracelet
Captain Benta sends you to kill a **Freezblood Majestic** (CONs yellow), west of Halas in **Guardian Forest (NE/N)**. Kill it, loot the bracelet, and return to Deputy Sools.

Deputy Sools sends you to **Captain Rulina**, who forwards you to **Mirea**.

### 🔵 Blue Elemental Ring
**Mirea** is in **Salisearaneen (C)** near a small well. From CLW, follow the southern road past the Inn. Look for a small road sign and path leading east to a faerie village—Mirea is there. She sends you to kill an **Ebony Wolf** (CONs yellow) in **Guardian Forest (S)**. Loot the ring and return to Deputy Sools.

Deputy Sools sends you to **Juno Inhop** regarding a green earring.

### 🟢 Green Elemental Earring
**Juno Inhop** is in the Inn southeast of CLW. He sends you to kill a **Frosteye Scarecrow** (CONs yellow) in **Diren Hold (SW)**. From Diren Village, head southwest toward the large mountain near Mt. Hatespike. The scarecrow is in a valley between two mountains. Loot the earring and return to Deputy Sools.

Deputy Sools sends you to **Merchant Balboa** for a lockbox.

### 💰 Lockbox
**Merchant Balboa** is in Halas near the windmill. Pay **1,585 tunar**, then return to Deputy Sools.

Deputy Sools sends you back to **Dixxon Tristar** with a letter.

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
Dixxon sends you to your **Class Guildmaster** in Castle Lightwolf (west side of the castle, 2nd floor):
- **Enchanter:** Trillon Zeber  
- **Rogue:** Tralum Lelam  
- **Shaman:** Sean Warlot  
- **Warrior:** Hilarn Strongfist

🎁 **Rewards:**
- **7,890,859 XP**  
- **Class/Path Item:**  
  - Enchanter: *Lycaon Beheader* **OR** *Tainted Black Wand*  
  - Rogue: *Black Tainted Knife* **OR** *Wolf Fang Knife*  
  - Shaman: *Skin Turned Kris* **OR** *Rabid Berserker*  
  - Warrior: *Lycaon Slasher* **OR** *Spirit Dancer*

---
---

## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 2, Level 40**
**NPC:** Dixxon Tristar  
**Location:** Castle Lightwolf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 40  
- Completion of your **Level 30 path quest**

---

Your Guildmaster sends you to **Dixxon Tristar** in CLW. Jewelry and talismans are missing, and he sends you to **Fali Rugger** in the **Murnf Inn**.

⚠️ **NOTE:** You may pre-farm all talismans before turning anything in—this saves a lot of travel. Mobs are normal spawns.

### 🟢 Green Elemental Talisman
Kill a **Forest Night Wolf** (CONs yellow@40) in **Murnf (S)** near the Great Tree (sees invis, social aggro). Loot and return to Dixxon.

### ⚪ White Elemental Talisman
Speak to **Delvar Rivers** in the Wyndhaven Inn. Kill an **Air Elemental** west of the Great Tree in Murnf (CONs red@40). Loot and return.

### 🔵 Blue Elemental Talisman
Speak to **Torgias Bullow**, second house west of the Murnf coach. Kill the **white-faced Werewolf** near the Great Tree (CONs red/yellow@40). Loot and return.

### 🔴 Red Elemental Talisman
Speak to **Keneto Barillo** in the Murnf Inn. Kill the **Ghoul** northwest of the werewolf area (CONs red@40, mana drain). Loot and return.

---

### 🧪 Deputy Sools (Night Only)
Bring **2,760 tunar**. Buy a vampire testing kit from **Huntress Lilly** north of the Murnf coach.

Go to **Jaeger Mansion** in **Twisted Tower (N)**. Deputy Sools spawns **only at night** (≈ :15–:45). Invis in; talk from the doorway to avoid adds. Kill **Garou Red Claws** to obtain the lockbox.

Return to Dixxon and complete the quest.

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
🎁 **Rewards:**
- **14,919,719 XP**  
- **Item Choice:**  
  - Enchanter: *Hammer of Lightwolf* **OR** *Wand of Mystery*  
  - Rogue: *Eagle Eye Sept* **OR** *Saber of Canis*  
  - Shaman: *Daywalkers' Demise* **OR** *Spear of Darkness*  
  - Warrior: *Daywalkers' Revenge* **OR** *Blood Drainer*

---
---

## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 2, Level 49**
**NPC:** Dixxon Tristar  
**Location:** Castle Lightwolf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 49  
- Completion of your **Level 40 path quest**

⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Keep **all items** until your final rewards and Path ability are completed!

---

### 🐍 Old Red
Sent to **Thurgrid McRaith** in Halas. Kill **Old Red** (giant eel, CONs red@49) off the coast in **Zentar’s Keep**. Must be in the ocean to trigger. Loot **Orb of Halas Aquamarine** and a torn paper.

---

### 📜 Orb & Seal Chain
- **Ives Radain** (Qeynos): sends you to **Bribro Mino** (Gunter’s Mine) → *Orb of Qeynos Peridot*  
- **Zebel Earblower** (Riverdale): sends you to **Commander Romar** (Fort Alliance SW) → *Orb of Rivervale Citrine*  
- **Lord Tearis Thex** (Fayspires): kill **Tae Ew Keeper** (Cazic Thule) → *Orb of Fayspires Jade*

---

### ❄️ Third Seal – Permafrost
Kill **Frostborn III** (LB@49), use his sword on the ice throne to spawn **Frostborn II**. Loot **Frostcleaver (3/4 seals)**.

---

### 👑 Fourth Seal – Unnamed King
In **Anu Village (NE)**, kill **Tolo Grimsteel** and **Ganron Lorebane**, then summon and kill the **Unnamed King** (CONs yellow@49). Loot the crown (4/4 seals).

---

## 🐉 PARATHIOR (Final Fight)
Bring all seals to **Oransan** in **Snowblind Plains (N)**. Ritual takes ~5 minutes. Speak to **Orinas (bear form)** to select Epic weapons. Kill **Parathior**, loot the **Ice Chunk**.

---

### ✅ Final Completion
Return to **Lord Tearis Thex**, then complete your class-specific approval tasks for your **Level 49 Path Ability**.

🎁 **Final Rewards:**
- **45,558,313 XP**  
- **Level 49 Path Ability**  
- **Path Weapon(s)**

Group 3 Good.guide:
## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 3, Level 30**

**NPC:** Daresh  
**Location:** Murnf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Lvl 30  
- Completion of your **Level 20 path quest**

---

Head to **Murnf** and speak with **Daresh**, who is upstairs in the building west of the coach *(for ease of quest completion, bind in Murnf)*. You are to find out everything you can from someone who works for an evil man named **Bardif** *(without Bardif himself becoming aware of your enquiries)* and about his kidnapped son **Tarlin**.

Go to **Qeynos** to speak with Bardif's butler, **Mergmar**. To find him: from the main gate, head west, then west again, south through the long hall, then the first east door. He sends you to a contact in **Highpass**.

Seek a dark elf named **Pwin**. Pwin can be found in the north section of HP, standing in the corral *(the non-coach exit)*. Speak with him and report back to Daresh.

---

### 🔐 The Jailor
Daresh tells you that Pwin is associated with a small orc stronghold in **Hate Spike**. The Jailor there likely held the kidnapped boy overnight.

- Head to **Mt. Hate Spike (The Last Inn)** *(W)*. From the DM coach, go to the river and run north. Upon entering Hate Spike, go west up the first snowy valley to find the **Bloodfoot Stronghold**.
- The **Jailor** *(CONs db@30)* is down the ramp, right side at the end of the hallway, on the right side of the cavern.
- He is **always up**, not a triggered spawn.
- Kill him, loot the **Unintelligible Note**, and return to Daresh.

⚠️ *Bloodfoot Bandits see through invis.*

---

### 💰 Ricser
Daresh sends you to an Inn where Bardif’s messenger is waiting. His name is **Ricser**.

- Location: **Lost Watch Fort**  
- Coach to **Wyndhaven**, then run north ~5 minutes along the road *(Wynd NW)*
- Pay Ricser **1,600 tunar** and return to Daresh

---

### 💍 Ziliq
The note reveals Tarlin was taken to the **Green Rift** and met with **Ziliq**.

- Ziliq *(CONs db@30)* is located in **The Green Rift (W)**  
- Coach to **Bobble-by-Water**, head west *(long run, have SoW)*
- He is in a temple built into the side of the rift
- Kill him, loot **Ring of Gal'Saris**, and seek **Kipcah**

---

### 🧭 Kipcah
- Coach to **FP**, exit north gate *(blacksmith)* and head west to **Marr’s Fist / Temple of Light (S)**
- Kipcah is in the center upon entering

He asks you to recover his **spyglass** from a Deathfist Lookout.

- Deathfist Lookout *(CONs yellow@30)* is southwest in **Deathfist Forge (NE)**, inside a hut
- Kill, loot the spyglass, and return to Kipcah

The spyglass is broken. Kipcah sends you to **Gligbin** in **Klick'Anon**:
- Gligbin is next to a wagon just inside the white gate
- No tunar required

Return the repaired spyglass to Kipcah. He reveals Tarlin’s location.

---

### 🔓 Free Tarlin
- Head to **Deathfist Forge (S)**, southwest from Kipcah
- Kill **Urtwar** *(CONs red@30)* at the top of the ramp on the right
- Invis in; a cleric sees invis partway up
- Loot the **Orc Shackle Key**, speak with **Tarlin** to free him

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
Return to **Daresh**. You will be rewarded with:

- **7,890,859 XP**  
- **Path Ability**  
- **Item Choice:**
  - **Druid:** Mishtur's Book **OR** Stormchaser  
  - **Magician:** Sifarus Wand **OR** Staff of Dooog  
  - **Monk:** Swiftclaw **OR** Resounding Staff  
  - **Ranger:** Springwind **OR** Sapoak Club

---
---

## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 3, Level 40**

**NPC:** Daresh  
**Location:** Murnf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Lvl 40  
- Completion of your **Level 30 path quest**

---

Speak with **Daresh**. Tarlin returned angry and has taken up necromancer arts. Bardif blames the druids and wants amends.

### 💰 Bardif
- Go to **Qeynos** and pay Bardif **3,000 tunar**
- Location: main entrance → main hall → left → end → side room left → first house right, second floor

⚠️ *Wereforms beware of Julie Tanner, the werehunter.*

---

### 🧾 Mergmar
- Speak with **Mergmar**, downstairs from Bardif
- He hints Tarlin liked floating towers in the north
- Return to Daresh

---

### 🏚️ Bandits
- Head to **Wyndhaven**, run east toward the fort on the hill near the ravine
- Kill **Tarlin’s Bandits** *(CONs LB–DB@40)* in the two towers
- Loot the note and return

---

### 🗡️ Assassin
- Go to **Qeynos** and enter Bardif’s house
- Assassin *(CONs db@40)* attacks immediately
- Kill, loot dagger, return to Daresh

---

### 📨 Three Messengers
Kill **Tarlin’s Agents** *(CONs yellow@40, triggered)*:
1. **Ferran’s Hope (C)** – Blacktongue Orc village
2. **Deathfist Citadel** – near throne or ramp
3. **Great Waste (NE)** – inside main building

Loot all notes and return.

---

### 💀 Necromantic Gems
**A) Vahk'Kiv** *(Guk S, CONs Yel@40)* – loot **Gem of Night**  
**B) Daglader** *(Tomb of Kings, CONs red@40)* – loot **Rune of Corpses**

Return both gems to Daresh.

---

### 🧟 Tarlin’s Guards
- From **Wyndhaven**, run north to **Bogman Village (SE)**
- Tarlin spawns under floating tower
- Three lvl 40 thugs spawn
- Kill or die; return to Daresh

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
Rewards:
- **14,919,719 XP**
- **Item Choices:**
  - **Druid:** Inflame & Inlaid Unicorn Horn **OR** Verdant Health & Silver-Banded Club
  - **Magician:** Earthen Mark & Icecrystal Totem **OR** Fiery Pebble & Crystallized Tome
  - **Monk:** Iron Stance & Pinewood Tonfa **OR** Eagle Stance & Silver-Studded Staff
  - **Ranger:** Hawk Eye & Jadesteel Katana **OR** Shockblade & Mithril Kama

---
---

## 🧭 Quest Name: **Group 3, Level 49**

**NPC:** Daresh  
**Location:** Murnf

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Lvl 49  
- Completion of your **Level 40 path quest**

⚠️ *Save all items until final rewards and path ability are chosen.*

---

Daresh wants **three NPCs dead**:

- **Arifr Beguile** *(Gunter’s Mines, CONs blue)* – loot robe
- **Malitor Weatherskin** *(Hazinak, Elemental Towers, CONs Yel)* – loot robe
- **Yaymz Searingtouch** *(Cazic Thule, CONs Yel)* – loot robe *(guards have Harm Touch)*

Return all robes.

---

### 🔐 Three Ciphers
1. **Elephant Graveyard (W)** – Centaur village popup
2. **Sea of Lions (C)** – Antlion larva cave *(see invis)*
3. **Box Canyons (S)** – Pit guardian *(Infernal Drakes see invis)*

Return all ciphers.

---

### 🏰 Tarlin’s Floating Tower
- Buy teleport gem from **Sorroian** *(Bogman Village E)* for **5,000 tunar**
- Use gem at floating tower *(Bogman Village SE)*
- Kill guard *(CONs blu)*, then **Tarlin** and pet *(CONs Yel)*
- Loot robe, return to Daresh

---

### 🔮 To Summon Chardith
- Go to **Takish Hiz (SW)**
- Find **Archmagus Terathin** in basement
- Defeat **Sun**, **Star**, and **Moon Magi**, looting each phylactery
- Choose epic weapon
- Summon and kill **Lord Chardith**, loot **Bone of Chardith**

---

### ✅ Final Quest Completion
Return to **Daresh** → class NPC → approval notes → **Level 49 Path Ability**

🎁 **Final Rewards:**
- **45,558,313 XP**
- **Weapon Choices:**
  - **Druid:** Oak Staff of Eilerawdl **OR** Triad Scimitar
  - **Magician:** Crystalmana Crosier **OR** Rod of Elemental Union
  - **Monk:** Ascendant Staff **OR** Sunsilver Blade
  - **Ranger:** Pure Emerald Longsword [2] **OR** Scimitar of Fury [2]

Group 4 Evil.guide:
## 🗡️ Quest Name: **Group 4, Level 30**

**NPC:** Belran Nightrift  
**Location:** Dark Solace

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 30
- Completion of your **Level 20 path quest**  
- ⚠️ *If you are an eastern human cleric or rogue and have low faction with Dark Solace, see NOTE at the end.*

---

### 📖 Quest Walkthrough

Talk to **Belran Nightrift** in Dark Solace. He will tell you a short tale about the ritual season and the need for a tome. You offer to help.

You are sent to **Muniels Tea Garden** to kill **Jolin Tofeph** *(CONs Yel@30)*. He can be found at the top of a tower near the coachman. Kill him and loot the **Bloody Letter**.

Inspect the **Bloody Letter**. It hints that **Nalzik P'Thek** in Freeport once had the tome but sold it. Coach to **Freeport**, head north, and go to the **2nd floor of the guild building by the dockmaster** to speak with Nalzik.

Nalzik P'Thek tells you he will only give you the buyer’s name if you do him a favor. He sends you to **Holciel Rowen'Dal** to collect the **Windstream Cutlass** from the **Lesser Halls**.

Travel to the **Tomb of Kings** (long run west from Freeport). Locate and kill **Tariel Windstream** *(CONs Red@30)* — he is a ghost and casts spells. Loot the **Windstream Cutlass** and return to Nalzik P'Thek.

> 📝 **Note:** When you reach the room where **Niktuu** is for the level 33 quests, take the exit in the left corner and explore that side of the Tomb of Kings for **Tinael**.  
> ⚠️ Tinael is found on the **left side** of the Tomb, not the right (which is full of red-cons and death). On your way in, pick up a **tea set** from Niktuu — you’ll need it for level 33 quests.

Nalzik now tells you that **Falder Malinar** *(CONs Yel@30)* has the tome. He is located upstairs in the **Shining Serpent Inn** (Bard Guild) in Freeport. Kill Falder and loot the **Ransom Note**:

> *"Falder, we have your tome. Meet us at the well near the docks. Bring 1,600 tunar."*

Take **1,600 tunar** and head to the well by the Freeport coach. Near a large rock, you will find **Grimefod Philch**. Speak with him and give him the money. When he attacks you, kill him and loot the **Antiquated Ring**. Return to Nalzik P'Thek.

Upon inspecting the ring, Nalzik explains it is the **Ring of Infinite Uselessness**, once owned by **Eljin Rindain**. You can find Eljin upstairs at the **Rusted Lantern Inn** near the Freeport coach area.

When you speak to Eljin Rindain, he summons a **Compelled Shade** *(CONs Wht@30)* and attacks you himself *(CONs Red)*. Kill Eljin and loot the **Tome of Dimensional Gates**.

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
Return to **Belran Nightrift** in Dark Solace.

**Rewards:**
- 🧠 **7,890,859 XP**
- **Cleric:** Elemental Guard *(+35 to each resist)* and **Dark Priest Warhammer** **OR** Bind Wounds and **Dark Priest Hammer**
- **Enchanter:** Expansive Mind and **Deceptive Staff** **OR** Power Jet and **Tainted Crystal Staff**
- **Rogue:** Evasion and **Steelthorn** **OR** Lesser Wound and **Ironspike**

---
---

## 🗡️ Quest Name: **Group 4, Level 40**

**NPC:** Thalnix D'Rinas  
**Location:** South Crossroads (Dark Solace)

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 40
- Completion of your **Level 30 path quest**

---

Talk to **Thalnix D'Rinas** (found opposite Belran Nightrift) in Dark Solace. He tells you the history of the **Great Crystal** and sends you to collect **four crystal shards** by completing four tests and defeating four golems. These can be done in any order.

### 🪨 Golem of Fear — *Deathfist Forge*
Speak with **Orish Thulon** in Deathfist Forge (E). He sends you on the **Test of Fear**. Travel to **Deathfist Citadel (C)** and kill a **Deathfist Fire Weaver** *(CONs LB)* near the trader in the center of camp. Loot the **Medicine Bag**, return to Orish, then kill the golem *(CONs Yel@40)* and loot the **Crystalline Shard of Fear**.

### 🪨 Golem of Station — *Stone Watchers*
Find **Watcher Mironar** in Stone Watchers (SE), on the green-glowing hill with stone pillars. He sends you to collect **three large ant carapaces** from the **Ant Colonies** (south). Kill black ant guards and carpenters until you have them. Return to Mironar, kill the awakened golem, and loot the **Crystalline Shard of Station**.

### 🪨 Golem of Strength — *Great Waste*
In Great Waste (SE), find **Drelk Trunkfist** in a half-shell. Kill Drelk *(CONs Yel@40)* to complete the test. Give his sword to the golem, then kill the golem and loot the **Crystalline Shard of Greed**.

### 🪨 Golem of Greed — *Dark Solace*
Near the invisible wall in Dark Solace, pay **Windle Gearprofit** **2,500 tunar**. Kill the golem *(CONs Yel@40)* and loot the **Crystalline Shard of Greed**.

---

### ✅ Quest Completion
Return all **four shards** to **Thalnix D'Rinas**, then speak with **Belran Nightrift**.

**Rewards:**
- 🧠 **14,919,719 XP**
- **Cleric:** Elemental Barrier *(+45 to each resist)* and **Night Priest Warhammer** **OR** Quick Stitching and **Cursed Morning Star**
- **Enchanter:** Limitless Mind and **Enthralling Branch** **OR** Power Surge and **Dark Visage Rattle**
- **Rogue:** Evade and **Twisted Dagger** **OR** Wound and **Steelsliver**

---
---

## 🗡️ Quest Name: **Group 4, Level 49**

**NPC:** Thalnix D'Rinas  
**Location:** South Crossroads (Dark Solace)

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 49
- Completion of your **Level 40 path quest**

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Ensure you have plenty of inventory space. Save **everything** NPCs give you until the quest is fully completed and your path ability is chosen.

---

Talk to **Gribble Greencog** in Dark Solace to log your quest. He needs **four ciphers** to complete *The Calling*. To create them, you must gather **two translations** of the **Tomes of Sun, Moon, and Stars**.

### 📘 Tome 1 — *Kelinar*
Travel from **Gunter's Mine** north along the mountains to **Kelinar**. Kill the following casters (all in watchtowers, second floor):
- **Faelial Elminiea** *(South)*
- **Lomal Hindel** *(Southeast)*
- **Llinior Orinial** *(Center)*
- **Kalen Falder** *(Center, further east)*

Loot all four tomes.

### 📘 Tome 2 — *Salt Mines of Caer Sloth*
From **Forkwatch** (or NE from Dark Solace), travel east to the Salt Mines. Near the bottom, before the spider area, kill **Collin Ilbeth** and loot the **Old Common Moon Tome**.

### 📘 Tome 3 — *Salt Mines (Deeper)*
Proceed deeper past Collin Ilbeth, down the ramps, through the drachnid gorgers, and into the circular room. Take the **fourth door on the right**, go down the ramp, kill the **Body Snatcher**, and loot the **Ancient Elven Moon Tome**.

Return to **Gribble**, then travel to **Highpass** and speak with **Feldink Shortquill** in the keep. Bring him **3,300 tunar** to create the ciphers.

Return to Gribble. He begins the ritual of **The Calling**. Stand at the **Invisible Man** location to summon the **Avatar of Lord Chardith**. Kill it, loot **Ethereal Matter**, and then speak with **Belran Nightrift**.

You are sent to **Archmagus Terathin**.

---

### 🔮 Summoning Lord Chardith
> 💡 **Tip:** If possible, group with others on this quest and gather all drops first. Doing so can reduce this stage to **2 minutes** instead of over an hour.

Travel to **Oasis**, then southwest to **Takish Hiz**. On the outskirts, find the building with the **blue lightning bolt sign**. Enter the basement and find **Archmagus Terathin**.

Agree to help him destroy the Magi. Choose which Magus to fight (order does not matter).

⚠️ **Important:** Only kill Magi **after** speaking with Terathin. Otherwise, they drop **fake phylacteries**.

#### ☀️ Sun Magus
Fight through the sun knight corridor, kill the **Sun Magus**, loot the **Sun Phylactery**, and return to Terathin.

#### ⭐ Star Magus
Fight through the star wisp area, kill the **Star Magus**, loot the **Star Phylactery**, and return.

#### 🌙 Moon Magus
Carefully clear moon wraiths (some see invis), kill the **Moon Magus**, and loot the **Moon Phylactery**.

After turning in all three, Terathin allows you to choose your **Epic Weapon** from the jeweled chest. This choice is **final**.

Speak to Terathin again to summon **Lord Chardith**. A scripted sacrifice occurs, then Chardith spawns. Kill him and loot **Bone of Chardith**.

---

### 🏁 Final Quest Completion
Return to **Gribble Greencog**. He sends you to a class-specific NPC to finalize your **Level 49 Path Ability**.

You will revisit NPCs representing your **Level 20, 30, and 40 quests**, collecting notes of approval. Return them to your NPC to choose your final ability.

**Final Rewards:**
- 🧠 **45,558,313 XP**
- **Cleric:** **Hammer of Absolution** **OR** **Mace of Repentance** *(Ward of Blessings: +65 resist, +10% WIS mod)*
- **Enchanter:** **Glory of Elddar** **OR** **Mithril Eagle Rod**
- **Rogue:** **Blacktongue [2]** **OR** **Heartsbane [2]**

---

### 🧾 Final NOTE (Eastern Human Cleric/Rogue)
Speak with **Davek Malall** in Freeport (first floor of the cleric temple). He grants **+1000 faction with Dark Solace**, allowing you to pass through the wall and log the **Level 30 quest**.

Group 5 Evil.guide:
## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 5, Level 30**

**NPC:** Director Holman  
**Location:** Zentar's Keep

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 30  
- Completion of your **Level 20 Path Quest**

---

Talk to **Director Holman** at Zentar's Keep. Holman can be found at the foot of the very tall statue near the coach. He needs you to obtain **three items**:
- **Thulian Circlet**  
- **Wraps of Bertoxxulous**  
- **Hatesplint Tunic**

There are three NPCs at Zentar's Keep who provide clues for each item (speaking to them is not required to advance the quest):
- **Mystic Horga** — west of the coach  
- **Sorceress D'Nedra** — west of the coach, 3rd floor  
- **Warlord Honan** — northeast, on top of the wall

***📝 Note:** You can talk to all three NPCs at once while in Zentar's Keep.*

---

### 👑 Thulian Circlet
Talk to **Mystic Horga**. He sends you to Freeport to speak with the gnome merchant **Twindle Fizzmop**. Twindle admits he has the circlet but will only sell it for **1,600 tunar** and a **Scared Monarch**.

Go to **Mayfly Glade (W)** and kill a **Monarch Butterfly** *(CON blue to 30)*. It is an easy kill, but monarchs will swarm you. Return to Twindle Fizzmop to receive the **Thulian Circlet** and **350,000 XP**.

---

### ☠️ Wraps of Bertoxxulous
Talk to **Warlord Honan**. He sends you to the **Salt Mines** to speak with **Slave Master Hern** (if he will talk to you). Hern is found in **Salt Mines (W)**, in a castle on a hill, standing near the north wall.

Slave Master Hern is short on manpower and wants **three bar patrons**. Travel to **Qeynos**. North of the coach is an inn. Go inside and wait for **Lora Greyson** *(CON blue to 30)* to spawn. Kill her. Wait for her to respawn and kill her again. Do this a third time until you have **three bar patrons** in your inventory.

Return to Slave Master Hern to receive the **Wraps of Bertoxxulous**, **+50 faction with Caer Sloth**, and **350,000 XP**.

---

### 🧥 Hatesplint Tunic
Talk to **Sorceress D'Nedra**. She sends you to **Fort Seriak** to speak with **J'Lisa U'Dedane**, located west of the coach. U'Dedane wants a gem from **Quicktoe**, a halfling.

Quicktoe can be found at the bottom of a pit in **Runnyeye Citadel**. Use invisibility to enter. Go through the main gate, pass a door and two sentries, turn left, then left again. At the first bridge crossing, **jump all the way down**.

When you hit the bottom, you may be attacked by several mobs. Kill them. Face the ramps and go **up the right ramp**, one level, into the west tunnel. You will receive a popup indicating a fight between **Quicktoe** *(CON yellow to 30)* and **three goblins** *(CON blue to 30)*. You may let him kill the goblins first or kill everything yourself. Be aware: **Quicktoe hits hard and heals**.

Kill Quicktoe and loot the gem.

> 📝 **Note:** Sometimes Quicktoe does not have the gem. You may need to wait for a respawn.

Return to **J'Lisa U'Dedane** with the U'Dedane gem to receive the **Hatesplint Jerkin**, **+50 faction with House U'Dedane**, and **350,000 XP**.

---

### ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 30)
You should now have all three items: **Circlet**, **Wraps**, and **Tunic**. Return to **Director Holman** for your final reward.

He will send you to one of the following for your **PATH reward**:
- **Warlord Honan** — Warriors  
- **Mystic Horga** — Shaman  
- **Sorceress G'Nera** — Wizard  
- **Sorceress Nime** — Alchemist

**Reward:** 🧠 **7,890,859 XP**

---
---

## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 5, Level 40**

**NPC:** Director Holman  
**Location:** Zentar's Keep

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 40  
- Completion of your **Level 30 Path Quest**

---

Talk to **Director Holman**, who sends you to **Zentar Reese** at the top of the keep. To find him, go up the south ramp past the spiritbinder and continue upward.

Zentar describes a vision of the **Unkempt Wood** twisted and ruined. He requires the **blood of his line** and sends you to kill his son, **Carrick Reese**.

---

### 🩸 Carrick Reese & His Blood
Carrick Reese can be found in **Mariel Village (C)** among the elves. He is in one of the trees with two elves and does not initially aggro *(CONs LB)*. When his health gets low, he will **SoW and flee**, so kill him quickly. Loot his body and return to Zentar.

Bring Carrick’s body to **Mystic Horga** (same building, lower floor). Horga drains the blood and gives you a bottle. Because Carrick was not evil, the blood must be corrupted.

Take the blood to **Hierophant Koligo** in **Grobb**. From the river, make a right, pass under the tree, repeat twice, then take the next right through a tree entrance (just before the bank).

Koligo requires two items:

#### 🪄 The Sceptre of Tal'Thaz
An ancient elven artifact. Buy it for **3,000 tunar** from **Twindle Fizzmop** in Freeport near the bank. He offers **two** scepters — the cheap one is fake.

#### 🔥 The Bonecaster's Censer
Found in **Guk Dungeon**. Invis in, follow left paths off the circle room. In the final dead-end room near Bonecasters and Heart Spiders, a popup appears — choose to take the censer.

Return to Koligo to corrupt the blood, then return to Zentar. *Map of Guk Dungeon*

---

### 🌿 Zentar's Plan
Zentar explains his plan to defile **Nature's Altar**. You must collect **three essences** by killing **Forces of Nature** *(CONs white to yellow)*: **Sun, Soil, Rain**.

Travel to **Wyndhaven**, head north along the shoreline, then east in **Mariel Village**. Stay north of the east–west mountain chain. You will find the Forces of Nature at **Twisted Tower (C)**. Kill them and loot all three essences.

Take the essences and the blood to **Unkempt Glade (C)**. From the druid camp, follow the road north briefly, go over the northwest hill, and find a lake with an island and a tree. Approach the tree to receive a popup — the tree takes the essences and gives you the **Golden Fruit**.

Travel to **Nature's Altar**. From the island, return southeast to the road, follow it north to a druid village. The altar is east of the road on a large hill with a **Stonehenge circle**. Approach the center, pour Carrick’s blood, and spawn **Oakhollow** *(CONs red)*. Kill it, loot the heart, then return to the altar and choose **break the heart**.

---

### ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 40)
Return to **Zentar Reese**.

**Rewards:**
- 🧠 **14,919,719 XP**
- **Alchemist:** Professor's Knack **OR** Neriak Cocktail  
- **Shaman:** Spirit Focus & Darkflame Club **OR** Wilting Wind & Darkflame Spear  
- **Warrior:** Howl & Calamitous Falchion **OR** Pillar of Force & Calamitous Poleaxe  
- **Wizard:** Freezing Clash & Blightbringer's Staff **OR** Mental Boost & Blightbringer's Wand

---
---

## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 5, Level 49**

**NPC:** Zentar Reese  
**Location:** Zentar's Keep

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 49  
- Completion of your **Level 40 Path Quest**

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** Ensure you have plenty of inventory space. Save **all items** NPCs give you until your final rewards and final Path ability are complete.

---

Zentar speaks of dreams involving a great ice creature and asks you to bring him the **Star of Salisearaneen**.

### 🧚 Faerie Protector
Travel to **Salisearaneen (N)**. The **Faerie Protector** *(CONs LB)* spawns near a druidic stone in a small faerie village between two hills. Approach the stone to trigger faerie attacks. After defeating waves, the Faerie Protector spawns. Kill him and loot the **Faerie Crystal**.

Place the crystal on the stone via popup and withdraw the **Star of Salisearaneen**.

Return to Zentar. He sends you to **Twindle Fizzmop** near the Freeport blacksmith to buy the **Gear of Hazoran**. He asks **8,000 tunar**, but haggling lowers it to **5,000 tunar**. Return to Zentar.

---

### ❄️ Seal 3 — Permafrost
Zentar explains that **Seals 1 & 2** are already gathered by **Oransan**. You must gather the final two seals.

Travel to **Permafrost (N)** and kill **Frostborn III** *(CONs LB@49)*. He roams the halls near Vox Castle. Loot his sword.

Take the sword to the **Ice Throne Room** and drive it into the throne to spawn **Frostborn II** *(CONs Yellow@49)*. Kill him and loot **Frostcleaver** *(3/4 seals)*.

> ⚠️ Wizards and shamans see through invis. Do not loot Voxite Mages or they will respawn.

---

### 🏰 Seal 4 — Unnamed King
Go to **Anu Village (NE)**. Enter the fort through the broken bridge. Invis before entering to avoid undead archers. Navigate down the ramp and prepare.

Kill **Tolo Grimsteel** and **Ganron Lorebane** *(CONs Red@49)* and loot their gems. Move the group to the back-right corner. The quester approaches the column to summon the **Unnamed King** *(CONs Yellow@49)*. Kill him and loot the **Unnamed Crown** *(4/4 seals)*.

---

### 🧊 PARATHIOR
Bring all four seals to **Oransan** at the broken tower in **Snowblind Plains (N)**, just west of the bear cave. After a ritual, **Parathior** spawns from the sky.

Speak to **Orinas (bear form)** immediately to choose your **Epic Weapon**, then prepare for battle. Stay downhill behind the tree to avoid AoE. Kill Parathior and loot an **Ice Chunk**.

---

### 🏁 QUEST COMPLETION (Level 49)
Return to **Zentar Reese**. He sends you to a class-specific NPC to finalize your **Level 49 Path Ability**.

You must visit three NPCs representing your **Level 20, 30, and 40 quests** to collect approval notes, then return for your final ability.

Class-specific notes:
- **Warriors:** Anu Village (SW), speak to the four warlords among the stones  
- **Shamans:** Guardian Forest (E), speak to **Elder Gabgug** in the druid rock circle  
- **Alchemists:** **Brindy Roro** in Highpass, then three NPCs in the next room

**Final Rewards:**
- 🧠 **45,558,313 XP**  
- Your **Level 49 Path Ability**  
- **Alchemist:** Epic (class-specific)  
- **Shaman:** Epic Spear **OR** Epic Club  
- **Warrior:** Epic Great Axe **OR** Epic Longsword  
- **Wizard:** Epic Rod **OR** Epic Staff

---

### 📝 Level 30 Path Quest Faction Note
If **Slave Master Hern** will not speak to you, your **Caer Sloth** faction is too low (often from XPing at Siloths). You must raise it to **-99**. Kill **Darkwood Goblins** southwest of **Darvor Manor** in **Alseop's Wall**. Each goblin grants **+1 Caer Sloth faction** — this may take time.

Group 6 Evil.guide:
## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 6, Level 30**
**NPC:** Count Luvincius  
**Location:** Oasis

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 30  
- Completion of your **Level 20 Path Quest**

---

Talk to **Count Luvincius** to log your quest. He is at the top of **Resenthorn Tower** in Oasis, on the island in the middle of the river. He asks you to prove yourself by finding **Quatzi** and purchasing some goods from him.

Quatzi is just outside near the dark tower by the beach. Exit the tower; he is on your left near the shore. Purchase **3 vials of gypsy blood** for **1,584 tunar** and return to Luvincius.

Luvincius sends you to **Talknar** in **Dark Solace**, outside the drow enclave near a rock. He explains that goblins have been attacking everyone despite a pact to leave each other alone.

He sends you to kill a **Goblin Messenger** *(CONs wht@30)*. Head due **NE** from Talknar, over a hill, to the crossroads. This goblin is a **triggered spawn** near a tree where all roads meet. Kill him, loot the **goblin message**, and return to Talknar.

---

### 🏳️ The Ambassadors
Talknar sends you to **Gungar Guglar**, located at an outpost outside **Grobb**, just west of the coach. Gungar sends you to **Tracker Jugl**, standing nearby next to a stump with his dog **Bloodseeker**.

Tracker Jugl sends you to kill **Ambassador Kreek** and **Ambassador Luj'Nak**, found outside **Guk**. Facing the stone entrance, climb on top of the **left wall**. The ambassadors are **triggered spawns** at the top. Although they con light blue, they are **casters** and may require help.

Kill them, loot the **goblin** and **froglok treaties**, and return to Gungar. Gungar then tells you to return to Luvincius.

---

### 🐺 Gutripper
Count Luvincius is unhappy that the goblins broke the pact and sends you to kill **Gut Ripper** as a warning to **Chik'Nar**, the goblin king.

**Gut Ripper** *(CONs DB@30)* is found in **Alseop's Wall**, inside the goblin **Darkwood Lair** cave. Invis inside, stay to the right, take the **second tunnel on the right** into Cookie’s room, hang a left, then go straight back. Guards con **LB**.

**Strategy:** Invis yourself and your pet, stand next to Gut Ripper on the ramp, send your pet in while you remain invis. You may get one add, but the lower guards will not aggro. Shadowknights may need to clear the room first.

Kill Gut Ripper, loot him, and return to Luvincius.

---

### ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 30)
**Reward:** 🧠 **7,890,859 XP**
- **Magician:** Wolfbane Staff **OR** Wolf Bone Totem  
- **Necromancer:** Bone Totem of the Wolf **OR** Sickle of the Wolf  
- **Shadowknight:** Claymore of the Shadow Wolf **OR** Partisan of Wolf Slaying

---
---

## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 6, Level 40**
**NPC:** Count Luvicious  
**Location:** Oasis

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 40  
- Completion of your **Level 30 Path Quest**

---

Talk to **Count Luvicious** in Resenthorn Tower. He sends you to **Quatzi** outside the tower to buy a **vial of Elven blood** for **2,766 tunar**. Return to Luvicious.

---

### ⚔️ Goblin Attackers – Honjour
Luvicious sends you to **Captain Opak** in **Honjour**, located in the southeast part of the fort. Opak asks you to speak with **Watcher Gabnu** at the top of a tower directly south of town.

After speaking with Watcher Gabnu, **three waves** of mobs spawn:
- Goblin Elites *(CON grn@40)*  
- Froglok Elites *(CONs wht@40)*  
- The Captain

Kill all mobs until you loot **one Glowing Silver Shard (ntl)**. Speak again with Watcher Gabnu, then return north to **Captain Opak**.

Opak gives you a note and tells you to return to **Count Luvicious** in Oasis. You are commended, but sent onward to **Kerplunk Outpost**.

---

### 🐊 Goblin Attackers – Kerplunk
Speak with **Elder Pugnug** in **Kerplunk Outpost** (center of village near the coach). He wants revenge on **Da Snapper** *(CONs WHT)*, who spawns in the nearby lake.

Kill Da Snapper and loot:
- Half-eaten note  
- Chunk of mysterious ore  
- Corpse of Grub

Return to Pugnug. He heals Grub, who is not fully dead. Return to Luvicious with the remaining items.

---

### 🐸 Froglok Tactician
Luvicious sends you to kill **Chareek the Tactician** *(CONs Red@40)* in **Guk Dungeon**, living side near the lower levels. Invis is required.

Clear the room first — multiple brutes, knights, and patrols will assist him. Chareek is initially **unattackable**; speak with him to spawn the killable version. Kill him and loot **all drops** (including head and hide). Return to Luvicious.

---

### ✅ QUEST COMPLETION (Level 40)
**Reward:** 🧠 **14,919,719 XP**
- **Magician:** Fiery Pebble **OR** Earthen Mark  
- **Necromancer:** Blood Storm **OR** Power Storm  
- **Shadowknight:** Bloodleech **OR** Grim Tower

---
---

## 🛡️ Quest Name: **Group 6, Level 49**
**NPC:** Count Luvincius  
**Location:** Oasis

---

### 📌 Requirements
- Level 49  
- Completion of your **Level 40 Path Ability**

> ⚠️ **Important:** Make room in your inventory. You must carry **all quest items** to trigger spawns and dialogue. Delete items only after receiving your final rewards.

---

Talk to **Count Luvincius** at Resenthorn Tower. He tells you about **Lord Chardith** and gives you the **Tome of Anikhius**, instructing you to gather **three ciphers** by speaking with **Elimandared**.

---

### ☀️ Cipher of the Sun — Elimandared
Elimandared is found in **Ethernal Desert (W)**. Head north from Oasis to the level 43 quest tower, then west to a small hill with dim ruins.

Elimandared tests you by summoning **Tubrenzalana** *(caster, CONs red@49)*. She uses AoE spells repeatedly. Kill her and loot her staff.

Elimandared gives you the **Stone of Elves** and sends you to **Fayspires** to buy a **Rune of Water** from **Aalean Mardum** (guild on the left, second floor). Buy it for **3,200 tunar** and return.

You receive the **Cipher of the Sun (1/3)** and are sent to **Sarek’s Tower**.

---

### 🌙 Cipher of the Moon — Vaeloficint the Wise
Vaeloficint resides at **Sarek’s Tower (C)**, top of the west tower. He gives you the **Script of the Moon** and sends you to **Cazic Thule (N)**.

Find **Inspector Xelebb**, a floating eye at the base of the pyramid. Speak with him to make him attackable. Kill him, loot the **rubicitic charm**, and return.

You receive the **Cipher of the Moon (2/3)** and are sent to **Highpass Hold**.

---

### ⭐ Cipher of the Star — Historian Hesslen
Speak with **Historian Hesslen** in Highpass Hold, under the ramp near the original bank. He sends you to **Box Canyons (SE)** to kill **Overlord Frank**.

Overlord Frank is a **triggered spawn** in a Takish bandit camp. You must approach very closely. Kill him, loot his ring, and return.

Hesslen sends you to kill **Xannasu**, a treant in **Sycamore Joy’s Rest (C)** within the Enchanted Forest. Pull him outside the green bubble to reduce adds. Kill him and loot the branch.

*NOTE:* Xannasu is triggered by passing through the twin-pillar gate **without invis**.

Next, return to Box Canyons and kill **Lantik** *(CONs Yel@49)* from the northern entrance. Lantik is also a **triggered spawn**. Loot his bracers and return.

Hesslen gives you the **Cipher of the Star (3/3)** and sends you back to Count Luvincius, who directs you to **Archmagus Terathin** in **Takish Hiz (SW)**.

---

### 🔥 To Summon Chardith
Travel to **Takish Hiz (SW)** from Oasis. On the east side of the ruins, find a building with a **blue lightning bolt sign** and enter the basement.

Speak with **Archmagus Terathin** and agree to help destroy the Magi. Choose each Magus in any order.

#### SUN
Kill the **Sun Magus** and loot the **Sun Phylactery**.

#### STAR
Kill the **Star Magus** and loot the **Star Phylactery**.

#### MOON
Kill the **Moon Magus** and loot the **Moon Phylactery**.

Terathin only speaks every **15 minutes** — be patient.

After turning in all three, open the jeweled chest and choose your **Epic Weapon**. This choice is permanent.

Speak to Terathin again to summon **Lord Chardith**. After a scripted sacrifice, Chardith spawns. Kill him and loot **one Bone of Chardith**.

---

### 🏁 QUEST COMPLETION (Level 49)
Return to **Count Luvincius**. He sends you to a class-specific NPC to finalize your **Level 49 Path Ability**.

You must visit representatives of your **Level 20, 30, and 40 quests** to receive approval notes, then return.

- **Necromancers:** Bottom floor of the Count’s tower  
- **Shadowknights:** Top of a tower in Zentar’s Keep

**Final Rewards:**
- 🧠 **45,558,313 XP**  
- Your **Level 49 Path Ability**  
- **Magician:** Crystalmana Crosier **OR** Rod of Elemental Union  
- **Necromancer:** Rod of Consuming Hatred **OR** Sickle of Avhi Escron  
- **Shadowknight:** Beheader of Isthiak **OR** Downfall
